title: Vin (clone commando)
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Vin}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Vin
RC-1134 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Taler? Vin? Jay? You receiving, over?|Darman tries to contact his squad mates|}} '''Vin''', whose number was '''RC-1134''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], Vin was created by [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloners for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Trained as a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]], he was a member of [[Theta Squad]], and spent his entire life alongside his squad mates [[Darman Skirata|Darman]], [[Jay (clone commando)|Jay]] and their [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]], [[Taler (clone commando)|Taler]]. The squad was deployed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and fought alongside [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]], another commando unit, against the forces of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. While fighting in a series of caverns under the planet's surface, Theta provided covering fire for Delta as they progressed through a breached [[Blast door/Legends|blast door]]. [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] warriors then overwhelmed Vin, Jay and Taler; however, and [[Death/Legends|killed]] them, leaving Darman as the sole survivor of Theta. Like all clone troopers, Vin was 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. ==Behind the scenes== RC-1134 first appeared in ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' a novel written by [[Karen Traviss]] and released in [[2004]]. He later received mention in other books in the [[Republic Commando|''Republic Commando'' series]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=RC-1134 |es=RC-1134 |pl=RC-1134 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Males]]
